events.title: Annual Regional Convention 2026
events.description: The flagship annual gathering of all medical students in the Southeast Region. Features academic competitions, leadership elections, health outreaches, and cultural nights.

events.title: Clinical Skills Webinar — Cardiovascular Examination
events.description: An interactive online session focusing on systematic cardiovascular examination techniques. Open to all clinical-year students across the region.

events.title: Hypertension Awareness Campaign — Enugu
events.description: Free blood pressure screenings, health education, and distribution of educational materials across communities in Enugu State. Join hundreds of medical students making a difference.

events.title: Research Methodology Workshop
events.description: Hands-on training in research design, data collection, statistical analysis, and scientific writing for undergraduate medical researchers.

news.title: NiMSA SE Wins Most Exceptional Region Award at National Convention
news.excerpt: The South East Region has once again been recognized as the Most Exceptional Region of NiMSA, marking three consecutive years of excellence in advocacy, outreach, and student leadership.
news.content: The South East Region has once again been recognized as the Most Exceptional Region of NiMSA, marking three consecutive years of excellence in advocacy, outreach, and student leadership.

news.title: Over 500 Students Benefit from Malaria Prevention Campaign
news.excerpt: NiMSA SE's public health team conducted a large-scale malaria prevention campaign across Imo and Ebonyi states, reaching over 500 community members.
news.content: NiMSA SE's public health team conducted a large-scale malaria prevention campaign across Imo and Ebonyi states, reaching over 500 community members with education, mosquito nets, and free consultations.

news.title: Launch of Southeast Literary Awards 2026
news.excerpt: The NiMSA Southeast Literary Awards returns for its second edition, calling for submissions in essay, poetry, and medical storytelling categories.
news.content: The NiMSA Southeast Literary Awards returns for its second edition, calling for submissions in essay, poetry, and medical storytelling categories from all medical students across the five Southeast states.

news.title: NiMSA SE Hosts Inaugural MAK NiMSA Health Week in Abakaliki
news.excerpt: The South East Region proudly hosted the inaugural MAK NiMSA Health Week in Abakaliki, honouring the memory of Mustapha, Aisha, and Kabiru — medical students lost in the tragic 2023 boat mishap.
news.content: In honour of Mustapha, Aisha, and Kabiru — three medical students tragically lost in a boat mishap in 2023 — the NiMSA Health Week was renamed the MAK NiMSA Health Week. The inaugural edition was hosted by EBSUMSA in Abakaliki, Ebonyi State, uniting Southeast medical students in remembrance and continued service.
